title: ononis natrix subvar. arachnoidea
intro: Ononis natrix subvar. arachnoidea, also known as Spider Restharrow, is a variant of the Ononis natrix plant, which is a type of legume native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ononis natrix subvar. arachnoidea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural diuretic. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion to make herbal remedies.
